subject: Transfer offer received for {player}
body:
{buyer} has submitted an offer for {player}.

The proposed fee is €{fee}. You can accept, negotiate a counter-offer, or reject it outright.

Consider whether the player is essential to your plans before making a decision.

es.subject: Oferta de traspaso recibida por {player}
es.body:
{buyer} ha presentado una oferta por {player}.

La cantidad propuesta es de €{fee}. Puede aceptar, negociar una contraoferta o rechazarla directamente.

Considere si el jugador es esencial para sus planes antes de tomar una decisión.
